name: Loopholemaxing Creation Engine
tagline: A constellation of independent engines under one roof.
description: A constellation of independent engines. Each one is its own creation; together they form a research, intelligence, commerce, and reading network. Agora is the public reading wing — the others remain distinct creations and continue to operate on their own.

wings.name: Army Link — Overseer Command Nexus
wings.summary: Passkey-gated entry surface for the Overseer Command Nexus. A command, audit, and orchestration view across the public creations — not a trading or execution venue. Static soft gate (client-side SHA-256), unlock state per browser tab.

wings.name: MMS HUB
wings.summary: Private Money Making Solutions control center for finance intake, provider readiness, bot orchestration, brokerage upgrade gates, and system health. The public page is only a doorway; the live HUB requires server-side authentication and keeps brokerage trading locked by default.

wings.name: BTC Intelligence Brain
wings.summary: A 15-chapter Bitcoin research and analysis workspace. Covers macro cycles, on-chain metrics, technicals, sentiment, institutional flows, trading frameworks, and risk management — with live market data, a 3D diagram of the system, and a research activity feed. Educational research only — not financial advice.

wings.name: NBA Loophole Brain
wings.summary: A 12-module NBA betting intelligence system built to detect line mistakes before the market corrects. Real-time odds modeling, schedule stress analysis, pace projections, injury impact scoring, prop market edges, arbitrage window scanner, and CLV tracking — all in one dashboard.

wings.name: PersonalVault
wings.summary: A zero-knowledge encrypted personal vault for your most sensitive documents. AES-256-GCM encryption runs entirely in your browser — the server never sees your data. Store IDs, insurance policies, financial accounts, medical records, passwords, and estate documents with military-grade security.

wings.name: FORMIX Ant Protein
wings.summary: A performance nutrition brand powered by the most protein-dense organism on earth. FORMIX delivers 28g complete protein per serving, all 9 essential amino acids, and a 95% lower carbon footprint than beef.

wings.name: OrbitRoute
wings.role: Software routing layer for orbital GPU networks
wings.summary: The software routing layer for orbital GPU networks — "Cloudflare for satellites." Routes enterprise AI workloads to orbital compute capacity with 35% cost savings versus AWS, GCP, and Azure. 10,657 satellites tracked, 17 ground stations, 12 autonomous AI engines, 5 patents filed.

wings.name: ULTRON
wings.summary: A local-first autonomous AI agent with a non-negotiable human-in-the-loop gate on every side effect. Reads, plans, proposes — but every trade, file write, deploy, and API call waits for an explicit human APPROVE. Zero OpenAI dependency: runs on Ollama locally, Anthropic or Perplexity in the cloud. 30 adversarial tests green, hash-chained audit log, kill switch.

wings.name: Tallahassee Camera Intelligence
wings.summary: A real-source public-camera aggregation dashboard for Tallahassee and Leon County. 407 verified cameras dedup'd from 593 raw feeds across City ATMS, FDOT, FL511, WeatherSTEM, FAA, and regional webcams — live snapshots proxied through a per-source Referer-aware backend. Map-first, dark-themed, with live traffic incidents and congestion overlays.

wings.name: Practically Natty Peptides
wings.summary: Research-grade peptides and performance compounds for the natty-adjacent athlete. Curated stack of GLP-1s, growth peptides, and recovery agents — third-party tested, lab-verified purity, discreet shipping. Partnered storefront with direct-to-consumer pricing.

wings.name: PeptiDex
wings.summary: Peptide research intelligence and education hub. A research-first peptide knowledge base built to turn compound research into structured education, guides, and affiliate-qualified traffic. Educational research only — not medical advice, and PeptiDex does not sell peptides.

wings.name: Universal Analyst Engine
wings.summary: A multi-domain AI intelligence engine that scores, ranks, and tracks entities across sports, markets, brands, politics, and entertainment. Live narrative ingestion, Polygon.io market data, AI sentiment scoring, and real-time alerts — 90 entities monitored across 5 domains, running 24/7.

wings.name: Agora — Library of Minds
wings.summary: A public-domain reading room for the philosophers who built the operating system of the West. 16 seed authors — Plato, Aristotle, Socrates, Heraclitus, Parmenides and more — with a compact catalog, source-traceable provenance (Project Gutenberg, Open Library, Wikidata, Perseus), and an in-browser reader for featured works. Modern copyrighted translations are never bundled.

engagement.name: Work With Clayton
engagement.role: Hire the operator behind these creations
engagement.summary: Hire the operator behind these creations. $497 Loophole Audit (48 hours) → $1.5–3.5K Build Sprint (5 days) → $3–7.5K/mo Operator Retainer. AI systems that find hidden revenue, automate operations, and turn scattered workflows and data into software that increases sales and cash flow.

roadmap.title: Reader
roadmap.summary: Public-domain reading room with source-traceable provenance. Live in Agora Alpha.

roadmap.title: Citation Ledger
roadmap.summary: Per-work citation chain with verification dates and edition pointers. The pattern is already running for the seed corpus.

roadmap.title: Influence Graph
roadmap.summary: Who-read-whom, who-cited-whom across the catalog. Static-first, no model gymnastics.

roadmap.title: Premium Research Dossiers
roadmap.summary: Deep, source-backed dossiers on a single thinker, period, or thread. Founding Circle access first.

roadmap.title: API Access
roadmap.summary: Read-only canonical-spine endpoints for authors, works, editions, sources. Not yet exposed publicly.

monetization.principle: Monetization-ready, not payment-ready. No card processor, no checkout flow. Only request-access primitives.

offers.title: Founding Circle
offers.summary: A small founding cohort gets early Premium Research Dossiers, private notes from inside the build, and a direct line to the engine room. No payment yet — request access only.

offers.title: API Access
offers.summary: Read-only endpoints for authors, works, editions, source pointers, and the citation ledger. Not yet exposed publicly. Join the waitlist with your use case.

offers.title: Premium Research Dossiers
offers.summary: Long-form, citation-graded dossiers on one thinker, school, or thread. Public-domain primary sources, modern critical secondaries cited but never bundled. No filler.

offers.title: Private Archives
offers.summary: Private editions of the reading-room pattern for institutions, research groups, and serious readers. Source ledger included. Private hosting, no shared catalog.

promises: Public-domain editions only — no copyrighted modern translations are bundled.
Every work has at least one canonical source URL — Project Gutenberg, Perseus, Open Library, Wikidata, or SEP.
Every excerpt names its translator, edition, and year. If we can't cite it, we don't ship it.
Catalog metadata is CC0. Re-use is welcome.
No vaporware: no AI-omniscience claims, no synthesised translations dressed up as scholarship.
